hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.repo-orchestrator/registry.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){process.stdout.write('\u26a0\ufe0f  repo-orchestrator: No registry found.\n   Run /init-context to bootstrap repo discovery and specialist agents.\n');}"
hooks.description: Warn if workspace has no registry yet. Silently skipped if node is unavailable.
